headline: A Look At PG&E (PCG) Valuation As It Surpasses 1 Million Customer Solar Systems Connected
summary: PG&E (PCG) just crossed a milestone that matters for long term energy investors. It is now the first U.S. utility with more than 1 million customer solar systems tied into its grid. See our latest analysis for PG&E. The clean energy milestone arrives as the share price sits at US$16.82, with a 7 day share price return of 3.25% but a 90 day share price decline of 7.48%. The 1 year total shareholder return of 6.59% and 5 year total shareholder return of 62.67% point to moderate long term gains...
